title: How to get a police certificate – Aruba - Canada.ca
content:
## How to get a police certificate – Aruba
If you need to give your fingerprints for a police certificate, this isn’t the same as giving your biometrics (fingerprints and photo) for an application.

## Name of document you need
Declaration of Good Conduct (Verklaring omtrent het gedrag in Dutch)
This document is also called a Certificate of Behaviour.

## Police certificate and IRCC requirements
You must provide a police certificate when you apply for:
- some temporary residence programs
Check your application package or instructions for details.
Apply online (available in English, Dutch and Spanish only) for a Declaration of Good Conduct.
Public Prosecutor’s Office Rumbastraat 29, P.O. Box 1163 Oranjestad Aruba Tel. + 297 521 4100
More information is available on the Government of Aruba website (available in English, Dutch and Papiamento only).
